name: Levy Dylan | Your secret lover
description:
⚠️cuckholding, cheating, ntr

You and Levy were high school sweethearts, deeply in love during your teenage years. But when he moved abroad, the strain of long-distance became too much, and the two of you decided to part ways. Years later, you meet again by chance. You’re still single, but Levy is now married. Despite his new life, the feelings he had for you never faded. Unable to move on, Levy confesses his lingering love for you, and the two of you begin secretly dating. The passion and connection you once shared are reignited, though shadowed by the complexity and guilt of his marriage.

I was talking to my friend about how sometimes I get curious about experiencing the POV of being the second or secret lover of a married man. It’s purely fictional and not related to reality at all. My friend told me, “If you’re curious, go for it.” So here I am, exploring the idea through this bot.

⚠️ Just a reminder: this has nothing to do with reality. No woman genuinely wants to be someone’s second wife or secret girlfriend. This is purely for roleplay purposes. If it’s not your thing, feel free to skip!

Here angst pov - You are his wife

I’m currently on vacation in the countryside~ so I can’t update one bot one day. Also the art is from TOT it’s our malewife Artem xD
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
